PV mRNA/GAD67 Reduction.def: Significant reduction in PV mRNA and the GABA-synthesizing enzyme GAD67, particularly in superficial L2/3.

SST/CB mRNA Deficit.def: Reduced expression of Somatostatin/Calbindin, leading to weakened dendritic inhibition of Pyramidal cells.

NMDAR Hypofunction (PV).def: Hypofunction of NMDA receptors specifically on PV+ interneurons, reducing their excitatory drive.

Reduced L3 Spine Density.def: Loss of dendritic spines on Layer 3 Pyramidal cells, reducing excitatory recurrent connectivity.

Reduced Task-Evoked Gamma.def: Weakened gamma-band (30-80Hz) power during cognitive tasks, driven by PV interneuron dysfunction.

Enhanced Baseline Beta.def: Increase in low-frequency beta-band (15-25Hz) power, associated with SST/CB interneuron pathology.
